note: Evolve this file as you test new transcript types. Add to we_provide as you gain access to more APIs. Add to always_mock as you identify more enterprise systems. Add to ask_customer patterns as you learn what customers can provide quickly.

we_provide.name: Claude API
we_provide.use_for: Any LLM/AI feature, chat agents, text processing

we_provide.name: Modal
we_provide.use_for: Pipeline jobs, background automation, cron jobs

we_provide.name: Supabase (demo instance)
we_provide.use_for: Database for demos that need persistence

always_mock.mock_strategy: Create dummy JSON store with realistic SFDC field structure: Id, Name, Amount, StageName, CloseDate, AccountId, OwnerId
always_mock.example_data: 10-20 realistic deal records in the customer's industry

always_mock.mock_strategy: JSON file mimicking HubSpot contact/deal structure with realistic pipeline stages
always_mock.example_data: Mix of leads, prospects, and closed deals

always_mock.mock_strategy: JSON with deal stages, contact info, activity history
always_mock.example_data: Realistic sales pipeline for their industry

always_mock.mock_strategy: SQLite DB or JSON with inventory/order/financial data structure
SQLite with schema inferred from the workflow described in transcript
always_mock.example_data: Realistic records using customer's actual industry terminology

always_mock.mock_strategy: Simulate payment responses with hardcoded mock transactions
always_mock.example_data: Mix of successful, pending, and failed transactions

always_mock.mock_strategy: Hardcode a demo user session — skip auth entirely in demo
Mock message feed with realistic team communication samples
always_mock.example_data: 5-10 realistic messages/threads relevant to the use case

always_mock.mock_strategy: Use CSV/JSON files locally mimicking the spreadsheet or doc structure
always_mock.example_data: Sample data relevant to their workflow

ask_customer.how_to_ask: Share the direct link to [X] so we pull from the right place
Grab your API key from [Settings → Advanced → API Keys] and paste it here
Export a sample of [X] as a CSV — even 20-30 rows is perfect
Send your logo file and brand colors — we'll make the demo feel like yours
Just confirming — [specific parameter] so we set this up the way you want

hosting_decision_guide.pipeline_automation: Modal — handles cron jobs, background tasks, serverless compute
hosting_decision_guide.chat_agent: Railway — needs persistent server for API calls
hosting_decision_guide.data_processing_job: Modal — pay per execution, no idle cost
